federation.note: PROTOTYPE of the Content-Addressed Concepts design (profile-1, urn:concept-def:1): definition-record extraction per the normative closed shape, reference-by-hash substitution, Unison-style SCC component hashing with stable member indexing over RDFC-1.0, multihash/multibase urn:concept: emission + https serving-path derivation, and a byte-pinned verify-by-recompute path. CLI: hash / verify / explain. Golden vectors committed (primes, gufo:Event, the bookmarks sector, cyclic pair, restriction, molecule, unicode gloss). Implementation deviations from the design doc are recorded precisely in DEVIATIONS.md — notably D8: the doc's literal duplicate-FDH rule rejects its own §3.4 record; implemented as bounded WL-refinement instead.
